meta.title: EO BAMBOO EMF 7.25% Gross 2026-2029 — Public Bond Offering
meta.description: Public bond offering by Bamboo Microfinance: FCFA 5 billion, 7.25% gross/year over 3 years. COSUMAF Visa No. COSUMAF-APE-03/26.

hero.visaPill: Offering approved by COSUMAF No. COSUMAF-APE-03/26
hero.title: Public Bond Offering
hero.quote: Your investment, turned into real financing for entrepreneurs and households.

video.title: Discover the offering in video
video.lead: A quick overview of the EO BAMBOO EMF 7.25% Gross 2026-2029 bond issue.
video.unsupported: Your browser does not support video playback.

issuer.title: Bamboo Microfinance
issuer.lead: Bamboo Microfinance is a microfinance institution licensed by the Central African Banking Commission (COBAC), operating in Gabon for over a decade. Its mission: to provide accessible financial services to entrepreneurs, households and micro/small businesses excluded from the traditional banking system.
issuer.docRef: Detailed mission, vision, values and key figures → Part 5 of the Information Document.

operation.title: Key terms of the offering
operation.tableCaption: Summary sheet — EO BAMBOO EMF 7.25% Gross 2026-2029

rows.v: 1-year grace period, then every six months over the last 2 years

operation.objetText: Financing loans granted to customers: civil servants, private-sector employees and traders.
operation.privilegeText: First-ranking security in favour of the bondholders' collective body.
operation.devNote: Exact amortisation terms, value date and maturity date will be finalised on the visa'd Information Document.

simulator.title: Simulate your investment
simulator.lead: Estimate what you would earn based on the capital invested and your tax residence.
simulator.residenceNote: The applicable tax will depend on the subscriber's country of residence.
simulator.amountHint: Multiple of 1,000 FCFA, between 50,000 and 5,000,000,000 FCFA.
simulator.amountWarningMin: Amount adjusted to the minimum subscription (50,000 FCFA).
simulator.amountWarningMax: Amount adjusted to the maximum issue amount (5,000,000,000 FCFA).
simulator.amountWarningStep: Amount rounded to the nearest multiple of 1,000 FCFA.
simulator.resultTotalInterest: Total interest earned over the term
simulator.ctaNote: An advisor will contact you by email to finalise your subscription.
simulator.ctaEmailSubject: Information request — EO BAMBOO EMF 7.25% Gross 2026-2029
simulator.modalLead: Please share your details — an advisor will contact you to finalise your subscription.
simulator.modalAmountInvalid: Please enter a valid amount, between 50,000 and 5,000,000,000 FCFA.
simulator.modalSuccessText: Your mail client has opened with your pre-filled request. An advisor will contact you shortly.
simulator.modalErrorTitle: Your form could not be sent
simulator.modalErrorText: No email application could be opened on this device. Please try again or contact us directly.
simulator.disclaimer: This simulation is provided for information only, based on the 7.25%/year gross rate and the offering's projected schedule (value date in October 2026). It is not a contractual commitment — refer to the Information Document for the exact terms.

syndicate.banner: Arranger & Lead Manager: Africa Bright Securities
syndicate.footnote: Subscriptions may be lodged with any of the approved placement agents above, during the subscription period from 15 July to 12 October 2026.

disclaimer.label: Regulatory notice
disclaimer.text: In accordance with the provisions governing Public Offerings in the CEMAC zone, this offering has been authorised by the Central African Financial Market Supervisory Commission (COSUMAF), under Visa No. COSUMAF-APE-03/26. Potential investors' attention is drawn to the fact that a financial investment carries risk and that the value of the securities may rise or fall, influenced by factors internal or external to the Issuer. The granting of a visa by COSUMAF implies neither approval of the merits of the offering, nor authentication of the information contained in the information document; it was granted after review of the relevance and consistency of the information. Read the information document carefully before making any investment decision.

footer.legalNotice: The information on this website is provided for information purposes only and does not constitute an offer to sell or a solicitation to buy securities. Any investment decision must be based exclusively on the Information Document relating to the offering, registered under number COSUMAF-APE-03/26.
